name: wac-marketing-app
description: WAC Group Marketing App — Phase 1: UTM & QR Code Generator

scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter @wac/web build && pnpm --filter @wac/api exec wrangler deploy --containers-rollout none
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm --filter @wac/web build && pnpm --filter @wac/api exec wrangler deploy --containers-rollout immediate
